tournaments.S-Tier (Elite): Maximum pressure. Save-heavy meta. Lower variance for stars. Round counts 24+.
tournaments.A-Tier (International): High skill. Aggressive CT limit-testing. Ideal for 'Over' props on entry fraggers.
tournaments.Regional/Season Games: The 'Grind' Meta. Wide skill gaps. Top seeds often farm stats. High 'Over' potential.
tournaments.Qualifiers & Grassroots: Chaos meta. High variance, aim-duel focus. Poor consistency (CV).

maps.Mirage: High-exec map. Clean horizontal sightlines favor consistent HS% for riflers. predictable angles.
maps.Nuke: High verticality. Complex crosshair placement makes HS% more volatile. Favor 'Under' for HS props.
maps.Ancient: Fast-paced, high-clutter. Mid-range duels favor spray-downs. HS volume follows high KPR on T-side.
maps.Anubis: 2026 Active Duty. Wide lanes, aim-heavy. Predictable head-level angles in 'A' main. High HS volume.
maps.Inferno: Cramped mid-rounds. High utility usage lowers pure aim duels. HS% can be high but total volume is lower.
maps.Dust 2: The 'Aim Map.' Long, flat lanes favor pure mechanical skill. Highest HS% potential for elite riflers.
maps.Overpass: Diverse elevations. Favors AWPers for Kills; riflers struggle with HS consistency at extreme ranges.
maps.Vertigo: Close-quarters. High volume of 'spam' kills through wood; significantly lowers pure HS%.
maps.Splinter: Released April 2026. High verticality and narrow lanes. Early data suggests lower HS% as players learn heights.
maps.Train: Retired from Active Duty Jan 2026. High verticality and long lanes; AWPer dominant for kills.

strat_archetypes.Economic Disciplinarians: High save frequency (2v4/3v5). Reduces total match duels. Favor 'Under' props.
strat_archetypes.Force-Buy Aggressors: Constant 2nd-round forcing. Creates high-attrition, messy rounds. Inflates Kills.
strat_archetypes.Tactical Executioners: Relies on set utility and late-round executes (<10s). Limits hero duels.
strat_archetypes.Star-Power Adaptive: Looser defaults that rely on individual multi-kills and stars winning 1v1s.

team_styles.Vitality: Archetype: Tactical Executioners. Systematic dominance using ropz lurking and ZywOo gravity.
team_styles.Falcons: Archetype: Star-Power Adaptive. High-aggression system built around NiKo and m0NESY opening picks.
team_styles.Spirit: Archetype: Force-Buy Aggressors. The 'Donk System.' Constant aim-duels and early-round contact.
team_styles.NAVI: Archetype: Tactical Executioners. Slowest pacing in pro CS. Extremely disciplined utility usage.
team_styles.FaZe: Archetype: Star-Power Adaptive. High reliance on individual veteran multi-kills.
team_styles.MOUZ: Archetype: Tactical Executioners. High-speed coordination and trade-fragging efficiency.

tournaments.S-Tier (Champions/Masters): Maximum utility discipline. Series often go to Map 3. Stars play for life; lower KPR but high Impact Rating. 24+ round average.
tournaments.A-Tier (International Leagues): The 'Meta-Forge.' Highly structured executes. High 'Over' potential for entry duels as teams fight for regional seeding.
tournaments.B-Tier (Challengers/VCL): The 'Hungry' Meta. High-aggression, high-variance. Teams favor aim-duels over set executes. Volatile stats.
tournaments.Qualifiers & Game Changers: Chaos meta. Unpredictable agent comps. High aim-check frequency; ideal for 'Under' props on inconsistent supports.

maps.Ascent: Tactical standard. Mid-control is king. High headshot consistency for riflers. predictable lane duels.
maps.Lotus: Triple-site complexity. Fast rotations favor high-mobility duelists. Multi-kill potential high on 'A' and 'C' mounds.
maps.Sunset: Mid-brawl dominant. Close-quarters duels in 'B' market favor high-speed trading and utility-assisted kills.
maps.Abyss: High verticality and falling hazards. Vertical crosshair placement is erratic; lowers pure HS% but increases utility kills.
maps.Haven: Rotation-heavy. Constant 3-site pressure creates isolated 1v1s. Predictable retake angles favor consistent entry stats.
maps.Icebox: Long-range horizontal duels. Favors mechanical aim and 'Over' props for elite Jett/Chamber players.
maps.Bind: Teleporter-driven variance. High utility-dump frequency in 'U-Hall' and 'Hookah' lowers pure gun-duel volume.
maps.Sanctum: Released April 2026. Shifting corridors and water-based audio cues. Early data suggests lower consistency as players learn timings.
maps.Split: Cramped 'Heaven' duels. High 'spam' through wood/walls; lowers pure HS% stats significantly.
maps.Breeze: Extreme range duels. Riflers struggle with HS consistency; elite snipers (aspas/zekken) dominate total kill volume.

strat_archetypes.Utility Executioners: Set-heavy style. Relies on smoke-timing and combo-util. Limits hero duels. Favor 'Under' for individual stars.
strat_archetypes.Contact Aggressors: Fast-paced, aim-heavy. Teams walk into contact to preserve util for the post-plant. Inflates total kill volume.
strat_archetypes.Mid-Round Adaptives: Slow map control focus. Teams wait for an opening and execute late (<15s). High pressure for clutch players.
strat_archetypes.Agent-Carry Focus: Built entirely around one star (Jett/Neon/Iso) getting fed space. High 'Over' potential for the primary carry.

team_styles.Sentinels: Archetype: Utility Executioners. Heavy reliance on coordinated utility and TenZ/zekken trade-fragging.
team_styles.MIBR: Archetype: Contact Aggressors. Brazilian 'Aggro' style focus. Fast entries and high-speed site hits.
team_styles.Leviatán: Archetype: Agent-Carry Focus. System built to create space for aspas. High variance for supporting cast.
team_styles.LOUD: Archetype: Mid-Round Adaptives. Known for creative agent comps and unconventional rotation timings.
team_styles.Fnatic: Archetype: Utility Executioners. Extremely disciplined, European-style coordination and crosshair placement.
team_styles.Gen.G: Archetype: Mid-Round Adaptives. High-speed coordination and elite trading efficiency from the Pacific region.
